languages.text: Вольный Торговец заключил союз с Инквизитором. Теперь ему предстоит найти связную с позывным "Элана".

traits.locale_text: Вольный Торговец заключил союз с Инквизитором. Теперь ему предстоит найти связную с позывным "Элана".

languages.text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. Now {mf|he|she} must find the agent operating under the call sign "Elana."
languages.original_text: Вольный Торговец заключил союз с Инквизитором. Теперь ему предстоит найти связную с позывным "Элана".

traits.locale_text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. Now they must find the agent operating under the callsign 'Elana'.
The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. Now they must find the agent operating under the callsign 'Elana'.
The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. Now {mf|he|she} must find the agent operating under the callsign 'Elana.'
The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. Now {mf|he|she} must find the agent operating under the callsign 'Elana.'

languages.text: {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} hat eine Allianz mit dem Inquisitor geschlossen. Nun muss {mf|er|sie} den Agenten mit dem Rufzeichen 'Elana' aufspüren.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. Now {mf|he|she} must find the agent operating under the call sign "Elana."

traits.locale_text: {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} hat eine Allianz mit dem Inquisitor geschlossen. Nun muss {mf|er|sie} den Agenten mit dem Rufzeichen 'Elana' aufspüren.

languages.text: {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a formé une alliance avec l'Inquisition. Il lui faut maintenant trouver la taupe qui se fait appeler « Elana ».
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. Now {mf|he|she} must find the agent operating under the call sign "Elana."

traits.locale_text: {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a formé une alliance avec l'Inquisition. Il lui faut maintenant trouver la taupe qui se fait appeler « Elana ».

languages.text: 行商浪人已经和审判官结成了同盟。现在{mf|他|她}必须找到那个代号为“埃拉娜”的特工。
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. Now {mf|he|she} must find the agent operating under the call sign "Elana."

traits.locale_text: 行商浪人已经和审判官结成了同盟。现在{mf|他|她}必须找到那个代号为“埃拉娜”的特工。

languages.text: {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha forjado una alianza con el inquisidor. Ahora debe encontrar al agente que opera con el nombre clave «Elana».
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. Now {mf|he|she} must find the agent operating under the call sign "Elana."

traits.locale_text: {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha forjado una alianza con el inquisidor. Ahora debe encontrar al agente que opera con el nombre clave «Elana».

languages.text: 自由貿易商は奉行と同盟を結んだ。彼は今、"エラナ "というコールサインを持つ連絡係を見つけなければならない。
languages.original_text: The Free Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. Now he has to find the liaison with the call sign "Elana".

languages.text: Hür Tacir, Engizisyoncu ile bir ittifak kurdu. Şimdi 'Elana' çağrı koduyla faaliyet gösteren ajanı bulmalı.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. Now {mf|he|she} must find the agent operating under the call sign "Elana."

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir, Engizisyoncu ile bir ittifak kurdu. Şimdi 'Elana' çağrı koduyla faaliyet gösteren ajanı bulmalı.
